types.notes: Passed by reference, no ownership taken
Passed by reference, no ownership taken
Passed by reference, no ownership taken
Passed by reference, no ownership taken
Passed by reference, no ownership taken
Pointer to Fare becomes reference in Rust

ownership.rationale: References in C++ map to references in Rust
Raw pointers in C++ map to references in Rust
String in Rust is owned, so we take ownership

functions.name: computePriceWithDetails
post: returns total price and fills outDetails

invariants: Deterministic pricing: same inputs produce same output
Linear scaling: price for N passengers = N × (single passenger price)
Fare availability: every flight in itinerary must have a matching fare
Non-negative final price: all components are non-negative
Precision: monetary values are formatted to 2 decimal places

concurrency.thread_safety: Not thread-safe, no synchronization primitives used

raw_spec:
types:
  - cpp: "Itinerary"
    rust: "struct Itinerary"
    ownership: "&"
    notes: "Passed by reference, no ownership taken"
  - cpp: "LogicalEntity"
    rust: "struct LogicalEntity"
    ownership: "&"
    notes: "Passed by reference, no ownership taken"
  - cpp: "SearchRequest"
    rust: "struct SearchRequest"
    ownership: "&"
    notes: "Passed by reference, no ownership taken"
  - cpp: "Fare"
    rust: "struct Fare"
    ownership: "&"
    notes: "Passed by reference, no ownership taken"
  - cpp: "Flight"
    rust: "struct Flight"
    ownership: "&"
    notes: "Passed by reference, no ownership taken"
  - cpp: "std::string"
    rust: "String"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "String is owned in Rust"
  - cpp: "const Fare*"
    rust: "&Fare"
    ownership: "&"
    notes: "Pointer to Fare becomes reference in Rust"
  - cpp: "double"
    rust: "f64"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Primitive type, no ownership"
  - cpp: "int"
    rust: "i32"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Primitive type, no ownership"

ownership:
  - cpp_pattern: "const &"
    rust_pattern: "&"
    rationale: "References in C++ map to references in Rust"
  - cpp_pattern: "raw pointer"
    rust_pattern: "&"
    rationale: "Raw pointers in C++ map to references in Rust"
  - cpp_pattern: "std::string&"
    rust_pattern: "String"
    rationale: "String in Rust is owned, so we take ownership"

error_paths:
  - source: "PricingException"
    recovery: "throw PricingException"
    rust: "Result<T, Error>"
  - source: "Invalid passenger count"
    recovery: "log warning and return 0.0"
    rust: "Result<T, Error>"
  - source: "Invalid tax rate"
    recovery: "log warning and return"
    rust: "Result<T, Error>"
  - source: "Invalid booking fee"
    recovery: "log warning and return"
    rust: "Result<T, Error>"

functions:
  - name: "computePrice"
    pre: ["itin, entity, req are valid"]
    post: ["returns total price"]
    side_effects: ["increments pricingCount_"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "computePriceWithDetails"
    pre: ["itin, entity, req are valid"]
    post: ["returns total price and fills outDetails"]
    side_effects: ["increments pricingCount_"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "setTaxRate"
    pre: ["rate is valid (0.0-1.0)"]
    post: ["taxRate_ is updated"]
    side_effects: ["logs change"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "getTaxRate"
    pre: ["none"]
    post: ["returns current taxRate_"]
    side_effects: ["none"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "setBookingFee"
    pre: ["fee is valid (>=0)"]
    post: ["bookingFee_ is updated"]
    side_effects: ["logs change"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "getBookingFee"
    pre: ["none"]
    post: ["returns current bookingFee_"]
    side_effects: ["none"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "resetToDefaults"
    pre: ["none"]
    post: ["taxRate_, bookingFee_, pricingCount_ are reset"]
    side_effects: ["logs reset"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "getPricingCount"
    pre: ["none"]
    post: ["returns current pricingCount_"]
    side_effects: ["none"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "resetPricingCount"
    pre: ["none"]
    post: ["pricingCount_ is reset"]
    side_effects: ["logs reset"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "findMatchingFare"
    pre: ["flight and fares are valid"]
    post: ["returns matching Fare or null"]
    side_effects: ["throws PricingException if no match"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "calculateTax"
    pre: ["baseFare is valid"]
    post: ["returns tax amount"]
    side_effects: ["none"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "applyPassengerMultiplier"
    pre: ["basePrice and numPassengers are valid"]
    post: ["returns multiplied price"]
    side_effects: ["logs warning for invalid numPassengers"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

invariants:
  - "Deterministic pricing: same inputs produce same output"
  - "Linear scaling: price for N passengers = N × (single passenger price)"
  - "Fare availability: every flight in itinerary must have a matching fare"
  - "Non-negative final price: all components are non-negative"
  - "Precision: monetary values are formatted to 2 decimal places"

concurrency:
  thread_safety: "Not thread-safe, no synchronization primitives used"
  shared_state: ["taxRate_", "bookingFee_", "pricingCount_"]
